javadoc_before:
/** * This class-level annotation enables native JUnit 4 rule support * within JUnit Jupiter. * *

Currently, rules of type {@code Verifier}, {@code ExternalResource}, * and {@code ExpectedException} rules are supported. * *

{@code @EnableRuleMigrationSupport} is a composed annotation which * enables all supported extensions: {@link VerifierSupport}, * {@link ExternalResourceSupport}, and {@link ExpectedExceptionSupport}. * * @since 5.0 * @see ExternalResourceSupport * @see VerifierSupport * @see ExpectedExceptionSupport * @see org.junit.jupiter.migrationsupport.EnableJUnit4MigrationSupport */
javadoc_after:
/** * This class-level annotation enables native JUnit 4 rule support * within JUnit Jupiter. * *

Currently, rules of type {@code Verifier}, {@code ExternalResource}, * and {@code ExpectedException} rules are supported. * *

{@code @EnableRuleMigrationSupport} is a composed annotation which * enables all supported extensions: {@link VerifierSupport}, * {@link ExternalResourceSupport}, and {@link ExpectedExceptionSupport}. * * @since 5.0 * @see ExternalResourceSupport * @see VerifierSupport * @see ExpectedExceptionSupport * @see org.junit.jupiter.migrationsupport.EnableJUnit4MigrationSupport * @deprecated Please migrate to Jupiter extensions. */
